summary: Profile Settings UI and React Query hooks were added, including optimistic update/rollback behavior. However, the diff summary does not provide evidence that the backend actually exports a public shared `update_profile` method or that the Candid/actor interface was updated to support it. Some additional changes (migration module and updating the profile setup modal to include new fields) appear beyond the explicit frontend Profile tab scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a Motoko canister method named update_profile that persists profile settings changes for the caller (display name, timezone, notification preferences) and update the Candid interface so the frontend can call it.
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend mutation calls `actor.update_profile(profile)` (hook added), but the provided `backend/main.mo` diff excerpt does not show any `public shared` method named `update_profile`, nor any explicit Candid/interface update evidence in the diff summary.
evidence: backend/main.mo (truncated excerpt does not show update_profile)

hallucinated_features.description: Added stable-state migration module and applied upgrade migration wiring.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest allows adding `migration.mo` only if required for a stable-state upgrade, but it was not explicitly requested as a requirement. The diff adds `backend/migration.mo` and applies it via `(with migration = Migration.run)` in `backend/main.mo`.

hallucinated_features.description: Extended the Profile setup modal to include timezone and notificationsEnabled defaults in the created UserProfile.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on implementing the Settings page Profile tab and canister-backed updates; it does not request changes to the first-time profile setup modal.
